inputs.name: angle
inputs.description: represent the degree of angle to project the filling of the component

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Aria label for the Status Indicator.

inputs.name: ariaRoleDescription
inputs.description: Aria defines role description for the Status Indicator.

inputs.name: ariaValueText
inputs.description: Aria Value Text for the Status Indicator.

inputs.name: clickable
inputs.description: boolean value to be marked as clickable

inputs.name: fillPercentage
inputs.description: Offset value to be filled under the give percentatge value.

inputs.name: fillingType
inputs.description: FillingType to represent the fill pattern of the component

inputs.name: focusable
inputs.description: Aria Focusable for the Status Indicator.

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: value id defines the id of the object.

inputs.name: labelPosition
inputs.description: defines the label position the value can be 'left' | 'right' | 'top' | 'bottom'

inputs.name: labelSize
inputs.description:
defines the size of the status indicator.
Can be one of the following: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'

inputs.name: role
inputs.description: Aria Role for the Status Indicator.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description:
defines the size of the status indicator.
Can be one of the following: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'
Default size is Medium(md).

inputs.name: status
inputs.description:
The status represented by the Status Indicator.
Can be one of the following: 'negative' | 'critical' | 'informative'
For default Object Status omit this property

inputs.name: statusLabel
inputs.description: Define the text content of the Status indicator

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: Aria title for the status indicator.

inputs.name: viewBox
inputs.description: positioning of the status indicator image within the defined height and width .
